introSection: Mark 1 is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SDC currently owned by Mexican carnival operator Grupo Garcia.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The Mark 1 dates back to the 1970s and travelled with Conklin Shows. It was later owned by Shamrock Shows.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Originally painted black with orange supports. The ride has since been repainted yellow with purple supports.

fullText:
Mark 1 is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SDC currently owned by Mexican carnival operator Grupo Garcia.

The Mark 1 dates back to the 1970s and travelled with Conklin Shows. It was later owned by Shamrock Shows.

Originally painted black with orange supports. The ride has since been repainted yellow with purple supports.
